en: Is that right? What do you think?
I'll tell you the truth, I haven't made up my mind.
I understand you're a man that knows how to get things.
ko: 네가 일을 잘 처리하는 사람인 걸 이해해.

en: I'm known to locate certain things from time to time.
ko: 나는 가끔 특정한 것들을 찾는 것으로 알려져 있어.

en: I wonder if you might get me a rock hammer. A what?
ko: 너가 나에게 암석 망치를 구해줄 수 있을까? 뭐라고?

en: A rock hammer. What is it and why? What do you care?
ko: 암석 망치. 그게 뭐고 왜 필요한데?

en: Well, if it was a toothbrush, I wouldn't ask questions. I'd just quote a price.
ko: 만약 그것이 칫솔이라면 질문하지 않을 거야. 그냥 가격을 말할 거야.

en: But then a toothbrush is a nonlethal object, isn't it?
Fair enough. Rock hammer's about six or seven inches long.
Looks like a miniature pickaxe. Pickaxe? For rocks.
So I'm a rock hound. At least I was in my old life.
I'd like to be again on a limited basis.
